events.title: Trixx Logistics pilot meeting (1pm Tijuana) — run Skills 1-5 end-to-end
events.notes: First real client run under JP's confirmed 5-skill 6-phase pipeline. Target: Trixx Logistics / Grupo Trixx / Trix Importaciones Comerciales S. de R.L. de C.V. (Mexican logistics, Tijuana, fundada 2002, 24 años, 5 sedes MX-USA, USDOT 2045279, 12 trucks). Owner: Hector Leyva. Contact: Andrea Chávez +52 1 664 533 3512. Inbound via Sofi → Andrea (referido caliente). Meeting 1pm Tijuana en oficina de Andrea. PROGRESO 2026-05-18 PM session 4: Skills 01 (company-analyst) + 02 (industry-analyst, sector logística cross-border MX) + 03 (competitor-analyst) EJECUTADOS con revisión humana entre cada uno; outputs en pipeline/clients/trixx-logistics/. Hallazgo crítico: competidor real es Nuvocargo (USD 74M AI-native, target 150-350 envíos/mes = segmento Trixx), no los agentes locales TJ. Talking points calibrados a primer encuentro: Reforma Ley Aduanera 2026 + responsabilidad solidaria + multas Carta Porte como ángulo táctico principal. PENDIENTE: (1) our_hypotheses.md fill (t-our-hypotheses-fill, juicio Ricardo, 20-30 min); (2) Skill 04 PrepLlamada calibrada relacional NO auditoría técnica; (3) opcional practice con JP; (4) opcional WhatsApp a Andrea preguntando audiencia. Post-meeting: Skill 05 (opportunity-report) consume reportes + recording → revisión obligatoria Ricardo+JP (Fase 5) → entrega manual (Fase 6).

events.title: Wire brand-kit logos into all 5 generate_docx.py renderers — DONE 2026-05-18 ahead of deadline
events.notes: COMPLETED 2026-05-18 PM. Brand Guide read; Aurora palette + logos + header/footer wired into all 5 renderers; refactored into skills/shared/brand.py as single source of truth (BRAND_GUIDE_VERSION=1.0 pinned). Test harness 32 PASS held throughout. Sample PDFs at /tmp/brand_test/. Future brand tweaks are single-file edits. Also closes the previously-deferred docx-renderer dedup item. JP-coordination pre-step skipped per Ricardo's directive.

events.title: Design intake-upload workflow + document handoff convention — DONE 2026-05-18 ahead of deadline
events.notes: DONE 2026-05-18 PM (3rd session). Workflow: bash infra/scripts/new-client.sh <slug> <country> '<name>' <sector> [--pilot] scaffolds the client folder + drops the two ADR-027 intake templates from skills/shared/ into 00_intake/. Operator fills research_input.md (facts, slice 1+2) and our_hypotheses.md (judgment, slice 3 — SEALED during Skills 01-03). Trigger phrase: 'Analiza <slug>'. Documented in pipeline/clients/_template/README.md + skills/README.md. Manual stand-in until /intake Telegram plugin lands in Plan 07. Legacy single-file operations/templates/fase_0_intake_form.md deleted (superseded by ADR-027 2-file split).

events.title: Scaffold pipeline/clients/trixx-logistics/ + capture intake + state.json
events.notes: cp -r pipeline/clients/_template pipeline/clients/trixx-logistics; populate 00_intake/ with WhatsApp + site findings; populate state.json with country=MX + phase=prospect + pilot=true. Unblocks t-monday-meeting-prep.

events.title: Migrate 3 test companies from Pilotos/ to pipeline/clients/<slug>/
events.notes: Architecture correctness: git mv Pilotos/Bodai → pipeline/clients/bodai-foods/, Ascenso → constructora-ascenso, Scarab → scarab-cycles. Per-skill outputs to station folders. Process-level deck + improvements .txt stay separate. Non-blocking for Trixx Logistics pilot.

events.title: Nexostrat real-capabilities catalog (internal — what we can deliver TODAY)
events.notes: Redirected by JP's redesign — now an internal reference rather than skill-prompt input (JP owns prompts). Useful when discussing solutions with the client during Fase 6 follow-up. Deliverable shape unchanged: 1-pager with service + fixed price + timeline + stack + 'cannot deliver today' list.

events.title: Confidence marking ✓/~/? in company-analyst (verify if still needed)
events.notes: JP's new opportunity-report has built-in ✅/⚠️/❓ marking. Check whether JP's new company-analyst SKILL.md also has it; if yes, this task is redundant. If not, add it. ~10-15 min if needed.

events.title: Technical brainstorm — DEFERRED until after 1-2 pilots
events.notes: Deferred per JP's 2026-05-18 directive (stop building, start testing). Re-evaluate after Monday's pilot. Pilot evidence determines whether state machine + automation are worth building.

events.notes: Deferred. Smaller scope than morning proposal (JP simplified to 6 phases, no paid sub-states). Gated on technical brainstorm and pilot evidence.

events.title: Build automation surface (booking + D+4 email + recording) — DEFERRED
events.notes: Deferred. Monday's pilot runs with manual scheduling/email/recording. Automation only valuable after the workflow is validated through 1-2 real client runs.
